problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: The key to What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? is Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type — specifically Stem cell differentiation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
